title: Potosi, PT — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Potosi, PT: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Potosi is a city in PT with a population of 250,000. Home to the legendary Cerro Rico silver mountain, one of the highest cities in the world at 4,090 meters.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
